docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, STEVEN AS INDIVIDUAL DBA FLYING COLORS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORGAN, STEVEN AS INDIVIDUAL DBA FLYING COLORS $384.00 PRINCIPAL, $151.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $535.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-03-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT ENFORCING THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO #7489
